title: Disposition Phase 2 -- Pricing Strategy Downstream Data
description: Shape of the dataForDownstream object written to the master checkpoint by the disposition pricing strategy phase. Covers asking price derivation, comparable sales adjustments, buyer universe segmentation, and market positioning.

askingPrice.description: Final recommended asking price supported by comp analysis and buyer viability.

compAdjustmentGrid.description: Comparable sales with line-item adjustments. Minimum 3 comps required.

comps.description: Array of comparable sales with adjustments.

pricePerUnit.description: Price per unit or per SF.

adjustments.description: Line-item adjustments applied to this comp.

category.description: Adjustment category (location, condition, size, age, market timing, etc.).

adjustmentPercent.description: Adjustment as decimal (positive = upward, negative = downward).

adjustedValue.description: Comp value after all adjustments applied.

selectedCapRate.description: Selected cap rate for pricing based on comp analysis.

capRateRange.description: Cap rate range from comp set.

buyerUniverse.description: Five-segment buyer universe with return analysis and pricing ceiling per segment.

segments.description: Array of buyer segments with return analysis.

segmentName.description: Buyer segment (institutional, PE, family office, 1031/tax-motivated, local operator).

targetReturn.description: Target return (IRR or cash-on-cash) for this buyer type.

maxPrice.description: Maximum price this buyer type can pay while achieving target returns.

viability.description: Viability of this segment at the asking price.

retradeRisk.description: Expected retrade risk from this buyer type.

closingCertainty.description: Certainty of close from this buyer type.

estimatedBuyerCount.description: Estimated number of active buyers in this segment for this asset.

probabilityWeightedPrice.description: Probability-weighted price across all viable buyer segments.

recommendedTargetSegments.description: Ordered list of recommended target segments.

pricingStrategy.description: Recommended marketing approach based on asset profile and buyer universe.

impliedCapRate.description: Cap rate implied by asking price and current NOI.

pricePerUnit.description: Asking price per unit (multifamily) or per SF (commercial).

daysOnMarketEstimate.description: Estimated days on market based on pricing level and market conditions.

listingVsOffMarketAnalysis.description: Comparison of listing vs off-market approach.
